For starters, should we add a .txt suffix to the filenames, then edit referring pages? 

----

<https://www.gnu.org/licenses/old-licenses/lgpl-2.0.en.html> notes that the GNU Library General Public License has been superseded by the GNU Lesser General Public License.

Let's get someone with suitable knowledge of licencing to advise on this bug.
